scripts.dev: PORT=3001 PYTHON_PORT=3001 python3 server.py & npx tsx server.js
scripts.start: PORT=3001 PYTHON_PORT=3001 if [ -f ./python/bin/python3 ]; then ./python/bin/python3 server.py & node dist/server.cjs; else python3 server.py & node dist/server.cjs; fi
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html auth-popup.html app.py gm_db.py thumbnail.jpg firestore.rules dist/ && esbuild server.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.lint: echo 'No TS linting needed for pure-Python applet'
